episodes.title: The Cost of Victory & Demon Clearing | Part 6 of 7
episodes.description:
I had won. The board resigned. The leader stepped back from all duties. The community was beginning to heal.

And then I collapsed.

This is the part of the hero's journey no one wants to talk about. The cost of slaying the dragon. What happens when the adrenaline finally stops and your nervous system comes crashing down.

After Buddhist Project Sunshine closed, I entered a nervous breakdown. A year of standing alone. A year of holding survivors' unbearable stories. A year of strategic precision while being threatened with ruin. When we were done—my nervous system was seriously compromised.

In Part 6, I share what I've never spoken about publicly:
⚡ The nervous breakdown that nearly destroyed me after victory ⚡ The coaching session with Steve Nobel where I saw three evil black demons drinking suffering through the roots of a beautiful lotus ⚡ The moment I named what I saw—and Steve was instantly booted from his own Zoom session ("The demons didn't want to be discovered") ⚡ The powerful energetic clearing that disconnected me from demonic forces feeding on decades of abuse ⚡ The mass ritual I did to release everything tied to that system ⚡ The resurrection—not just surviving breakdown, but reclaiming power and wisdom
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
This isn't just strategic activism. This is energetic warfare. Spiritual. Mythic.

You're not just fighting institutions. You're fighting forces that feed on harm.

And you need protection. Clearing. Support.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
WHY I'M SHARING THIS NOW:

Americans are heading toward the same collapse I experienced. Running on rage and adrenaline. Carrying unbearable truths in isolation. Witnessing ICE killings, democratic collapse, cruelty as policy.

Your nervous system keeps score.

If you try to carry your torch without building sustainable capacity—without learning how to protect your nervous system, disconnect from consuming forces, and ask for help BEFORE the breakdown—you will collapse.

I learned these skills through brutal recovery. I'm teaching them so you don't have to learn the hard way.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
💎 PICK UP YOUR TORCH: 6-Week Diamond Heart Leadership Circle for Americans Reclaiming Democracy

Week 2: Activate your 12 Chakras of Ascension (energetic protection and power I didn't know how to access) 
Week 4: Build sustainable skills—boundaries, energy management, strategic action, community support (so you don't collapse after victory) 
Week 6: Commit to a clear plan with ongoing support (you're not alone)

PLUS: FREE Torch Empowerment Bridge Call September 27—support continues months after the program ends.

episodes.title: Standing Alone Against a Global Cult | Part 5 of 7
episodes.description:
When the Shambhala Board threatened to sue us into financial ruin, everyone backed out. Carol Merchasin, the survivors, the investigator—all gone. I stood alone in the wilderness with nothing but what I knew to be true.

This is the moment where most people quit. The moment where the wild woman who knows has to decide: Will I abandon what I can see clearly? Or will I stand alone—even when the cost becomes unbearably real?

In Part 5, I share: ⚡ How I found a defamation lawyer willing to work pro bono when legal protection seemed impossible ⚡ The strategic mastery (King Zharion Ara'Khan wisdom) that brought the scattered tribe back together ⚡ How we published Phase 2 and brought down a global institution ⚡ The moment the board resigned and the leader stepped back from all duties ⚡ What happens when you refuse to abandon your torch—even when you're the only one left standing
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
This isn't just history. This is what Americans are living RIGHT NOW.

"I see what's happening. I know it's wrong. But as one person, I can't make measurable change."

Yes, you can. This video shows you how.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

episodes.title: They Threatened to Sue Us All: When The Shambhala Board Showed Its True Face Part 4 of 7
episodes.description:
After Phase 1 was published, a tidal wave of emails came. Hundreds of people reached out—including survivors of sexual abuse by Sakyong Mipham Rinpoche, the current living guru.

One person who reached out changed everything: Carol Merchasin, a professional investigator of sexual harassment.

Carol was a tracker. She knew how to follow the trail of harm through institutional wilderness, how to build evidence that couldn't be burned. Together, we created the strategy for Phase 2: investigating the living guru.

I taught the community the Jesuit Horizon Analysis—a contemplative method for receiving triggering content without shutting down. I created a container for difficult truth.

The Shambhala board announced they wanted mediation. We agreed, thinking it could be a way to share what we knew. We met with their mediator via Zoom. I'll never forget her shock—her glasses kept slipping down her nose as Carol and I shared what we'd found.

After that meeting, the board never followed through on mediation.

Instead, they threatened to sue me, Carol, and every single survivor if we published the Phase 2 report.

This is when the dragon reared up and threatened to destroy us with its fire. This is when everyone backed out.

🔥 PICK UP YOUR TORCH: 6-Week Diamond Heart Leadership Circle

Developing the backbone to stand your ground when the dragon threatens doesn't happen by accident.

Week 2: 12-Chakra Activation awakens inner sources of power that give you backbone—the capacity to stand when others fall.

Week 3: Identify YOUR torch with absolute clarity. When you know it in your bones, you can face the dragon.

The first step is easy—just fill out the application. No commitment, no pressure. Just clarity.

episodes.title: The Most Terrifying Thing I Did: Naming Abuse in Front of 10,000 People Part 3 of 7
episodes.description:
I posted in a Facebook group with 10,000 members—the Shambhala community where I had been sexually abused as a child, where speaking about these things had been forbidden.

I named a high-profile abuser publicly. I named my friend's suicide. I invited people to read the Buddhist Project Sunshine report coming out on February 15th.

Lady Diana Mukpo, the widow of Shambhala's founder, sent a condemning email to the entire community. Twice. She was furious. I was mortified.
But something unexpected happened: she amplified my reach to thousands more people.

Then—no one came forward. Despite everything I had built to make it safe, NO ONE responded. I started writing a report about the project's FAILURE.

Two weeks before the deadline, victims started coming forward. Slowly. Terrified. By February 15th, I had six victim impact statements.

This is the story of crossing the threshold, preparing to fail publicly, and discovering that strategic deadline design can make the impossible possible.

🔥 PICK UP YOUR TORCH: 6-Week Diamond Heart Leadership Circle

Week 2: Awaken Your Inner Sources of Power through 12-chakra activation. You can't carry light into darkness on willpower alone.

The first step is easy—just fill out the application. No commitment, no pressure. Just clarity about whether this path is calling you.

episodes.title: Behind the Scenes: Why I'm Telling This Story Now
episodes.description:
I didn't want to tell this story. Buddhist Project Sunshine was behind me—I had healed, moved on. But watching what's happening in America, I couldn't stay silent.

In this behind-the-scenes video, I share why I'm telling the Buddhist Project Sunshine story NOW, how I went from being voiceless in a cult to developing an unstoppable voice, and why Americans need Lyran strategic mastery in this moment of democratic crisis.

You'll hear: → The IBM story: Speaking up three times and losing points for my team → How I exposed sexual violence in the Shambhala community despite everyone backing out → My landlord case: Taking on a $14.5 billion corporation without a law degree → King Zharion Ara'Khan's teaching on recovering what was destroyed in you

This isn't just my story—it's a map for anyone who needs to find their voice and pick up their torch in impossible situations.

episodes.title: Everyone Begged Me to Stop: Finding the Mentor Who Changed Everything Part 2 of 7
episodes.description:
When I decided to expose decades of sexual violence in the Shambhala Buddhist community, I thought I'd form a collective of women leaders who had experienced the abuse themselves.

Instead, they begged me not to do it. They were terrified—of what would happen to me, of what would happen to them, of challenging an institution that had spent decades silencing survivors.

This is Part 2 of my Buddhist Project Sunshine story—and it's about what happens when the people you thought would stand with you step back in fear.

It's about the moment of doubt when you wonder if maybe they're right, maybe it IS impossible.

And it's about finding the mentor who doesn't give you answers—but gives you a framework powerful enough to chart your own course.

IN THIS VIDEO, I SHARE: ✦ Why the women leaders I approached refused to join me (and begged me to stop) ✦ The moment I almost walked away from the whole thing ✦ How I found Karlene—and why she was the PERFECT mentor even though she'd never exposed a Buddhist cult ✦ The Lyran strategic principle: find someone who understands the DYNAMICS, not someone who's walked your exact path ✦ How we created the Buddhist Project Sunshine approach together—victim impact statements, safe truth-telling containers, strategic information release

THE TEACHING FOR YOU:
You don't need a mentor who has faced your exact situation. You need someone who understands the PATTERN you're navigating—institutional resistance, systemic silencing, standing alone when it matters.

episodes.title: The Wild Woman Who Exposed a Cult: My Journey Begins Part 1 of 7
episodes.description:
There is a torch bearer in each of us. She lives in the wild place—the place that knows injustice when she sees it, that refuses to let bones stay buried, that will not be silenced even when silence is safer.

This is Part 1 of a 7-part series sharing the story of Buddhist Project Sunshine—how I exposed decades of sexual violence in the Shambhala Buddhist community, catalyzed international investigations, and ultimately led to the resignation of the organization's highest leader.

But this isn't just a story about what I did. It's a teaching about what YOU can do when you discover YOUR torch and commit to carrying it—even when the odds seem impossible.

IN THIS VIDEO, I SHARE: ✦ How my parents found their guru through an alphabetical spiritual search (yes, really) ✦ What it was like growing up inside a world where predation was normalized and the wild feminine instinct was destroyed ✦ My grandmother's warning—and why seeing clearly doesn't always mean you can act ✦ The parallel between cult dynamics in Shambhala and what Americans are experiencing now ✦ The moment I received the call to expose the truth—and how Lyran strategic mastery helped me see a path forward when everyone else saw only obstacles

This series is told in the style of Clarissa Pinkola Estés' Women Who Run With The Wolves—mythic storytelling that honors the archetypal patterns while grounding them in lived experience.
